faqs.question: How quickly can you buy my house?
faqs.answer: We can complete a purchase in as little as 7 days, though the average is around 14 days. The timeline depends on your circumstances and how quickly your solicitor can process the paperwork.

faqs.question: Do you charge any fees?
faqs.answer: No. We cover all costs including legal fees. There are no estate agent commissions, no survey costs, and no hidden charges. The price we offer is the price you receive.

faqs.question: How do you calculate your offer?
faqs.answer: We base our offers on current market data, recent comparable sales in the area, and the condition of your property. Our offers are typically below full market value, reflecting the speed and certainty we provide.

faqs.question: What condition does my property need to be in?
faqs.answer: We buy properties in any condition. Whether your home needs minor cosmetic work or major structural repairs, we will make you an offer. You do not need to spend any money preparing your home for sale.

faqs.question: Can I change my mind after accepting?
faqs.answer: Yes. You are under no obligation until contracts are exchanged. You can withdraw at any point before exchange with no penalties or costs.
